items.title: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture
items.summaryShort: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture. Slack modernized its data platform by replacing SSH based execution in Amazon EMR pipelines with a REST driven orchestration layer called Quarry.

items.title: Angular's Official Agent Skills Helps AI Coding Tools Write Modern Angular
items.summaryShort: Angular's Official Agent Skills Helps AI Coding Tools Write Modern Angular. Google's Angular team has released a repository called angular/skills, focusing on Agent Skills that enhance AI coding agents' ability to write modern Angular code.

items.title: Pinecone Brings AI Agents Directly to Enterprise Data with Microsoft OneLake Integration

items.title: Run Untrusted AI Agent Code Safely with Azure Container Apps Sandboxes
items.summaryShort: Run Untrusted AI Agent Code Safely with Azure Container Apps Sandboxes. Microsoft has announced the public preview of Azure Container Apps Sandboxes.

items.title: Presentation: Moving Mountains: Migrating Legacy Code in Weeks instead of Years
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Moving Mountains: Migrating Legacy Code in Weeks instead of Years. David Stein shares how to rethink large-scale architectural migrations using AI.

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
items.summaryShort: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know. TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days.

items.title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump's controversial pick to lead spy agencies

items.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar's video AI is built for India's scale
items.summaryShort: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar's video AI is built for India's scale. Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation
